context: v3.22 Phase 3 — AdaptiveBatchScheduler driving live D-FINE waves, RTX 5080, max_throughput
final_reason: preprocess-bound (cpu 29ms vs forward 27ms) and throughput plateaued -> hold at 12; growing batch won't help the GPU
headline: Scheduler climbed 4->12 (71->210 fps, 3x) then STOPPED at the measured CPU-preprocess bottleneck. Honest 'why not more GPU' with numbers.
